channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump exempts nearly 70 coal plants from Biden-era rule on mercury and other toxic air pollution
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration has granted nearly 70 coal-fired power plants a two-year exemption from federal requirements to reduce emissions of toxic chemicals such as mercury, arsenic and benzene.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lawyers for Harvard in Trump administration dispute are no strangers to high-profile legal matters
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The two attorneys representing Harvard University in a pitched fight with the Trump administration are no strangers to the spotlight or to Washington investigations that reach into the White House.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats prioritizing illegal immigrants over citizens is ‘mind-boggling,’ White House says
item.description: The comments come as Sen. Chris Van Hollen floated possibly traveling to El Salvador to check on a Maryland resident the Trump administration deported to El Salvador in an “administrative error.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AOC claims Republicans will 'trick' Americans into identity politics, stoking racial divisions
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez told rally goers Monday evening not to let Republicans "trick" them into thinking they are defined by their race or other immutable characteristics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jeffries: Court should hold Trump officials in contempt over wrongly deported Maryland man
item.description: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) said Tuesday that the Supreme Court should hold members of the Trump administration in contempt of court if they don’t move to return a Maryland man mistakenly deported last month to El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Top Trump agency reveals key reason why REAL ID will be enforced
item.description: In a memo exclusively obtained by Fox News Digital, the department said that part of the reason REAL ID will be enforced is to prevent those in the country illegally from flying domestically.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Core Democratic groups are preparing to be targeted by the Trump administration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As President Donald Trump pushes the historical boundaries of executive power, some of the Democratic Party's core political institutions are preparing for the possibility that the federal government may soon launch criminal investigations against them.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: West Point graduate becomes the first woman to compete in the grueling Army Ranger contest
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A female Army Ranger for the first time competed in the annual Best Ranger Competition, and her two-soldier team finished the grueling three-day event over the weekend and came in 14th overall. First Lt. Gabrielle White, and her teammate, Capt.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A whistleblower’s disclosure details how DOGE may have taken sensitive labor data
item.description: A whistleblower tells Congress and NPR that DOGE may have taken sensitive labor data and hid its tracks. “None of that information should ever leave the agency,” said a former NLRB official.
item.dc:creator: Jenna McLaughlin, MPR News

item.title: The Latest: Judge will order sworn testimony by Trump officials in case of wrongly deported man
item.description: A federal judge in Maryland will order sworn testimony by Trump officials to determine if they complied with her orders to facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia from an El Salvador prison.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Philadelphia prosecutor seeks a third term, saying progressivism is ascendant despite Trump setbacks
item.description: HARRISBURG, Pa. (AP) — The Philadelphia prosecutor who became a campaign trail punching bag for Republicans amid rising crime in U.S. cities during the coronavirus pandemic is running for reelection on the back end of a withering effort to oust progressive district attorneys nationwide.
item.dc:creator: MARC LEVY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden alleges Trump has 'taken a hatchet' to Social Security in his first post-presidency speech
item.description: Former President Joe Biden warns that President Donald Trump has “taken a hatchet” to Social Security, weighing in on a critical issue for millions of Americans.
item.dc:creator: Steve Peoples And Fatima Hussein, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Stephen Miller contradicts DOJ court docs on man mistakenly deported
item.description: White House aide Stephen Miller contradicted a number of statements the Trump administration has made in court, claiming a Maryland man was not deported to a Salvadoran prison in error.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Harvard rejects Trump demands for funding
item.description: Harvard University on Monday rejected demands from the Trump administration as it threatens the school's federal funding as part of a broader clampdown on higher education.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, NewsNation

item.title: Trump blames Zelensky for Ukraine war after '60 Minutes' interview
item.description: President Trump on Monday sought to distance himself from the war between Russia and Ukraine as his promise to end the conflict quickly has proven difficult to accomplish. "The War between Russia and Ukraine is Biden’s war, not mine.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Sanders jokingly calls Ocasio-Cortez his daughter at Utah rally
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) joked during a joint appearance at a Utah rally on Sunday that Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.) was his daughter, praising the progressive lawmaker and highlighting her background.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: A retrial of Sarah Palin's case against 'New York Times' begins Monday
item.description: Former Alaska Gov. Sarah Palin has the rare opportunity to retry her defamation case against The New York Times even though she lost it — twice in a 24-hour-period — in early 2022.
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik, MPR News

item.title: Trump admin tells judge man wrongly deported to El Salvador is alive, still detained
item.description: On Friday, federal judge Paula Xinis had ordered the Trump administration to provide daily updates to return Kilmar Armando Abrego Garcia to the United States.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Tariffs could impact Tampa Bay shoppers, businesses by summer, economist says
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — Cheri Hudson owns clothing store Imagine That!!! in South Tampa. It has been her business for 25 years. She is a supporter of President Trump’s trade policies. “I trust Donald Trump. It's only going to be a matter of time. The tariffs are fair.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Sisolak rematch with Lombardo? Former governor says he's considering it
item.description: Former Gov. Steve Sisolak is considering challenging Gov. Joe Lombardo in 2026, he told Politics Now host John Langeler on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump threatens to put higher tariff rate back if countries don’t strike deals
item.description: President Trump on Thursday threatened to reverse course on a 90-day pause on country-specific tariffs if countries don’t strike a deal with his administration before then.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Trump reverses Biden rule restricting water usage for showerheads and other home appliances
item.description: President Donald Trump has long complained about modern rules that limit water flow for showerheads, making it harder for him to wash his "beautiful hair.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Daly, WFLA, NBC
